commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bound Codex chat plan controls, mode-specific think defaults, live progress delivery, chat approval/input buttons, persisted binding/config state, tests, and Codex harness docs.

PR surface: Source +1330, Tests +1091, Docs +50. Total +2471 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new Codex chat-control feature rather than reporting a current-main bug. The central behavior is source-reviewable in the PR head and covered by mocked tests, but not by live transport proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor real-environment proof plus maintainer review after rebase; automation cannot provide the contributor's live chat proof for them.

target.title: feat(codex): add bound chat plan controls
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds native `/codex plan` controls for bound Codex conversations, including persisted plan-mode preference on app-server thread bindings.
- Adds mode-specific `/codex think plan|execute ...` defaults so planning and execution turns can use different reasoning effort settings.
- Adds chat-native plan approval controls for bound Codex conversations, including approve, approve with clean context, and stay in plan mode buttons.
- Adds optional `/codex live` progress delivery for bound Codex turns and routes single-choice Codex user-input prompts back into chat buttons.
- Documents the full bound Codex plan-control workflow in the Codex harness docs.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/conversation-chat-controls.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-turn-collector.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-control.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/session-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/commands.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/codex/index.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/session-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/session-binding.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/user-input-bridge.ts extensions/codex/src/command-formatters.ts extensions/codex/src/command-handlers.ts extensions/codex/src/commands.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-chat-controls.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-chat-controls.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-control.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-control.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-turn-collector.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-turn-collector.ts`
- `pnpm format:docs:check docs/plugins/codex-harness.md docs/plugins/codex-harness-reference.md`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Bound Codex chats can toggle native plan mode, store mode-specific plan/execute thinking defaults, show live progress, render plan approval/question buttons, and execute approved plans either in the current thread or a newly rebound clean Codex thread.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on branch `feat/codex-plan-controls`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused Vitest, tsgo extension prod/test configs, targeted oxlint, docs formatting check, and `git diff --check` as listed above.
Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest reported 6 files / 130 tests passed; targeted oxlint reported 0 warnings and 0 errors; docs formatting and diff whitespace checks passed; tsgo commands exited successfully.
Observed result after fix: Plan-control state, command handlers, conversation binding, app-server binding persistence, and docs tests all pass for plan toggling, mode-specific thinking defaults, approve, approve-clean, stay, live progress, and user-input button behavior.
What was not tested: A live Telegram/Discord roundtrip against a real Codex app-server account was not run for this draft PR.
